name: data-workers
description: 3 pre-built skills that chain the open-source Data Workers agent swarm into complete data-engineering workflows. Trace end-to-end lineage for any table across catalogs, run a full data-quality audit with anomaly context, and walk a data incident from symptom to root cause — all through one local MCP server with 160+ tools that runs on in-memory sample data until you connect Snowflake, BigQuery, or Databricks.
